issueDatetime.description: The date and time the warrant was issued.

quantity.description: The number of shares the warrant entitles the holder to purchase.

exercisePrice.description: The per-share price at which the holder can purchase the underlying shares upon exercise.

purchasePrice.description: The upfront cost paid by the holder to acquire the warrant itself. May be absent if no purchase price was paid.

shareClassId.description: The identifier of the share class associated with the warrant.

vestingScheduleTemplateId.description: The identifier of the vesting schedule template. May be absent if the warrant has no vesting schedule.

expirationDatetime.description: The date and time the warrant expires. May be absent if the warrant has no expiration.

schema_def.description: The issuance transaction for a warrant. Represents the initial issuance of a warrant.
